identity.mission: Create a high-precision, trust-inducing UI for construction analysis that blends Swiss clarity with industrial tactility. Avoid generic SaaS 'clean' looks by injecting 'Site Safety' aesthetics (Orange/Black/White) into the digital space.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Architectural Blueprints' with 'Fintech Dashboards'.
Emotion First: The user should feel 'Structural Integrity' and 'Precision'.
Content is King: The Drawing and the Data are the heroes. UI recedes.
Zoom In: Focus on the details of the blueprint analysis.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to prevent data overwhelm.

rules: Headings (h1-h4): Barlow Condensed, Uppercase for section titles to mimic architectural labeling.
Body: Inter for readability. Use 'tracking-wide' for small labels.
Data/Numbers: JetBrains Mono for all dimensions, costs, and quantities. This is non-negotiable for precision.
Weights: Use 'font-light' for large display numbers and 'font-bold' for critical alerts.

primary.name: Blueprint Blue
primary.usage: Brand anchors, primary headers, active states

accent.name: Safety Orange
accent.usage: Call-to-actions, warnings, critical data highlights (The 'Site' aesthetic)

strategies.name: The Workspace Split
strategies.description: For the Analysis page. Left 60%: Drawing Viewer (Interactive). Right 40%: Data/Controls (Scrollable).

strategies.name: The Dashboard Bento
strategies.description: Summary view. Mix of 1x1 (KPIs), 2x1 (Charts), and 2x2 (Recent Analysis).

upload_zone.content: Large icon, clear instruction 'Drop PDF/PNG Blueprint here'.
upload_zone.interaction: On drag over: Border turns Accent Orange and background dims.

boq_table.columns: Item # (Mono), Description, Unit, Qty (Mono), Rate (Mono), Amount (Mono).

drawing_viewer.features: Pan/Zoom controls floating bottom-center. Layer toggles (Walls, Doors, Elect) top-right glass panel.

cards.style: Flat, 1px border (border-border), no shadow (or very subtle 'shadow-sm'). Header separated by line.

timeline.style: Gantt-style horizontal bars. Rounded-full ends. Color-coded by phase (Foundation=Grey, Structure=Blue, Finishing=Orange).

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle 'Grid Pattern' background for the drawing viewer area to imply precision.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Hard, directed shadows for floating elements (Tools) to mimic physical objects on a table.

motion.loading: Skeleton loaders with a 'shimmer' effect matching the site grey.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'react-zoom-pan-pinch' for the drawing viewer interaction.
Implement a 'Split View' for the Analysis page (Drawing Left, Data Right).
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to maintain the architectural feel.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all financial and dimensional data.
Ensure the 'Safety Orange' is used sparingly for CTAs and critical alerts only.
Create a new route '/drawing-analyzer' for this module.
Preserve the existing 'App.css' styles but extend with specific module classes where needed.
Use 'Recharts' for the cost breakdown donut charts and schedule timeline.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use generic AI emojis.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Ensure high contrast for accessibility (WCAG AA).
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
